name: Illini Golf
address: 4700 N University St ste 70, Peoria, IL 61614
about: Illini Golf is a premier indoor golf and fitting center in Peoria, Illinois, offering year-round access to golf through its advanced simulator technology and club fitting services. The facility houses five Foresight Falcon simulator bays for full-swing analysis and practice, alongside the only publicly accessible PuttView green in Illinois for AR-powered putting practice. A fully stocked pro shop offers a curated selection of equipment from major brands like Titleist, Callaway, and TaylorMade, complemented by in-house club repair and custom fitting services.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level Foresight Falcon simulator and launch monitor data for accurate practice and fitting
The only publicly accessible PuttView green in Illinois for advanced putting practice
Comprehensive club fitting services using data to optimize distance and dispersion
Year-round indoor golf, allowing practice regardless of weather
Expert coaching with data-driven feedback for accelerated improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol or bar service

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade launch monitor for full-swing data analysis used in lessons and fittings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are encouraged to bring your own clubs, but they must be clean and in good condition to protect the screens. You can also use your own clean golf balls.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of a kitchen or bar on-site, so bringing outside food and drinks is likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required depends on the number of people and skill level. A good rule of thumb is one hour per person (e.g., 1 person = 1 hour, 4 people = 4 hours).

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is kid-friendly. They offer dedicated putting sessions, and the environment is suitable for golfers of all skill levels, including beginners and juniors.
